queries.question: Show me chapters each textbook has.
queries.sql: SELECT Chapters.chapterName  from Textbooks_Chapters join Chapters on Textbooks_Chapters.chapterName = Chapters.chapterName join Textbooks on Textbooks_Chapters.textbookId = Textbooks.id   GROUP BY Textbooks_Chapters.chapterName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Textbooks_Chapters.textbookId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Textbooks)

queries.question: Show me chapters each textbook has.
queries.sql: select textbooks.title , chapters.chaptername from Textbooks_Chapters join Chapters on Textbooks_Chapters.chapterName = Chapters.chapterName join Textbooks on Textbooks_Chapters.textbookId = Textbooks.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?chaptername WHERE {
  ?textbooks_chapters a :Textbook_Chapters .
  ?chapters a :Chapters .
  ?textbooks_chapters p:hasChapters ?chapters .
  ?textbooks a :Textbooks .
  ?textbooks_chapters p:hasTextbooks ?textbooks .
  ?textbooks p:title ?title .
  ?chapters p:chapterName ?chaptername .
}

queries.question: What are the subjects and names of chapters that correspond to every textbook?
queries.sql: SELECT Chapters.chapterName, Chapters.subject  from Textbooks_Chapters join Chapters on Textbooks_Chapters.chapterName = Chapters.chapterName join Textbooks on Textbooks_Chapters.textbookId = Textbooks.id   GROUP BY Textbooks_Chapters.chapterName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Textbooks_Chapters.textbookId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Textbooks)

queries.question: What are the subjects and names of chapters that correspond to every textbook?
queries.sql: select textbooks.title , chapters.chaptername , chapters.subject from Textbooks_Chapters join Chapters on Textbooks_Chapters.chapterName = Chapters.chapterName join Textbooks on Textbooks_Chapters.textbookId = Textbooks.id

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  ?textbooks_chapters a :Textbook_Chapters .

  ?textbooks_chapters p:hasChapters ?chapters .

  ?chapters p:subject ?subject .
}

queries.question: For each textbook chapter, list the subjects.
queries.sql: select textbooks.title , chapters.subject from Textbooks_Chapters join Chapters on Textbooks_Chapters.chapterName = Chapters.chapterName join Textbooks on Textbooks_Chapters.textbookId = Textbooks.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?subject WHERE {
  ?textbooks_chapters a :Textbook_Chapters .
  ?chapters a :Chapters .
  ?textbooks_chapters p:hasChapters ?chapters .
  ?textbooks a :Textbooks .
  ?textbooks_chapters p:hasTextbooks ?textbooks .
  ?textbooks p:title ?title .
  ?chapters p:subject ?subject .
}

queries.question: Tell me the subject of each textbook chapter.
queries.sql: SELECT Chapters.subject  from Textbooks_Chapters join Chapters on Textbooks_Chapters.chapterName = Chapters.chapterName join Textbooks on Textbooks_Chapters.textbookId = Textbooks.id   GROUP BY Textbooks_Chapters.chapterName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Textbooks_Chapters.textbookId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Textbooks)
